'''Xeltek''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
[[File:RancisisFuneral-Rep76.jpg|thumb|right|300px|The Jedi remember the fallen.]]
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] being, Xeltek was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Attaining the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], when the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Xeltek survived until the final year of war when he was dispatched to the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|front lines]] of [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] under the command of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]].<ref name="R76" />

During the fighting there, Xeltek was killed in the fighting with the [[Morgukai Shadow Army]]. During the [[Funeral of Oppo Rancisis|funeral]] of Master Rancisis, fellow Jedi [[Xiaan Amersu]] mourned her fallen comrade, along with the others who had died on the battle field.<ref name="R76" />

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 76|''Republic'' 76]] {{1stm}}
